rulings.Case Title: IN RE CATHERINE R DEMARTINI REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/17/92, AS AMENDED
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer to First Amended Petition for Revocation, Recission, etc. of Trust Amendments sustained with leave to amend. The prayer cannot set forth causes of Action. Section IV is entitled "claim" but fails to set forth facts sufficient to state a cause of action. Motion to Disqualify is ordered off calendar as the issue is moot. Lori DeMartini has substituted in as her own attorney in place of Herman Franck. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415)551-3702 and opposing counsel or party no later than 4:00 p.m. on September 22, 2011.
